title: quadlet: support `Memory=` in `[Container]` sections
body:
Maps to the `--memory=` flag.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Support for `Memory=` in `[Container]` units.
```

comments.body: Not sure what my changes have to do with the `{int podman fedora-41,{int,sys} remote debian-13} root host sqlite` failures. They look to be CI resource-related.
